name: Wine Baked Chicken and Artichoke Hearts
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup dry sherry, or white wine
1 teaspoon fresh basil OR 1/4 teaspoon dried garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken.
2. Place the quartered chicken in a baking pan.
3. Arrange the artichoke hearts around the chicken pieces.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the tomato sauce, wine (or dry sherry), spices, salt, and pepper. Mix well to taste.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Bake for 45 minutes in a preheated oven at 400°F. Baste occasionally with the pan juices.
7. Serve hot with pilaf and salad.
Makes 4-5 servings.
